mapper.sql:
and upper(sourceProtocol) = upper(#{sourceProtocol})
and upper(tableName) = upper(#{tableName})
and sourceSystem = #{sourceSystem}
and rownum =1
mapper.select: select count(0) from SourceInfo where SOURCEPROTOCOL=#{sourceProtocol} and TABLENAME=#{tableName} and DATA_ID =#{dataId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select from SourceInfo

select ID, SOURCEINFOID, TABLEID, RESOURCEID, FIELDNAME, FIELDDESCRIPTION, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLENGTH, ISNONNULL, ISDELETED, ISPRIMARYKEY, ISFOREIGNKEY, INSERTTIME, UPDATETIME, DATABASEURL, SCHEMEID, FIELDSOURCETYPE, FIELDCODE as fieldId, FIELDCODE, GADSJFIELDID, DETERMINERID, fd.determinerName as determinerName from (select * from Source_Field_Info where SourceInfoID = #{SourceInfoID}) sfi left join (select distinct dchinsename as determinerName, determinerId as value from synlte.fielddeterminer where determinerstate = '05') fd on fd.value = sfi.DETERMINERID
select case when max(recno) is null then 0 else max(recno) end as recno from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where objectId = #{objectId}
select objectID from synlte."OBJECT" where tableID = #{tableID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rownum = 1

select sjxjbm as sourceId ,name as dataSourceName from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where upper(tablename) = upper(#{addTableName}) AND sjxjbm is not null AND PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and rownum =1

select v1.codeid as mainClassifyId , v1.codetext as mainClassifyCh , v2.codeid as primaryClassifyId , v2.codetext as primaryClassifyCh , v3.codeid as secondaryClassifyId , v3.codetext as secondaryClassifyCh, v4.CODEID as threeClassifyId, v4.CODETEXT as threeClassifyCh from (select CODEID, CODENAME, CODETEXT, PARCODEID from v_classify_info
where codetext = '数据组织分类'
where codetext = '数据来源分类'
) v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid = v2.PARCODEID left join v_classify_info v3 on v2.codeid = v3.PARCODEID left join v_classify_info v4 on v3.codeid = v4.PARCODEID order by v3.codeid asc

select tablename from synlte."OBJECT"
tablename = #{realTableName}

select objectId from synlte."OBJECT"
tablename = #{realTableName}
select tablename from synlte."OBJECT" where objectid = #{objectId}
select distinct labelcode , labelname , labellevel ,classid ,PARENTID,LABELLEVELNAME from synlte.labels order by nlssort(labelname,'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') asc
select count(*) from synlte.syndmg_table_all where partitiondate > to_char(sysdate -7 ,'yyyyMMdd') and upper(tablename) = upper(#{tableName})
select count(*) from STANDARD_TABLE_CREATED where upper(TABLE_NAME) = upper(#{tableName})
select count(*) from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(fieldId) = upper(#{fieldId})
select count(*) from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where upper(fieldname) = upper(#{fieldName})

select v2.codetext||'/'||v3.codetext from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid=v2.parcodeid left join v_classify_info v3 on v2.codeid=v3.parcodeid where v1.codetext = '数据组织分类' and v2.codetext = '原始库' and v3.codetext = #{classifyStr}
select distinct tableId from synlte."OBJECT"

select SJZYLYLX, YYYXTMC, YYYXTMM, YYYXTJSGS, SOURCEID, SJZYSQDWMC, SJZYSQDW_SQDWDM, SQDWLXR, SQDWLXDH, SJZYWZ, SJZYCCFZX, SJZYGLMC, SJZYBSF,SJZZYJFL,SJZZEJFL,SJZYGLDW_GAJGJGDM, JRFWF,TGJRFS,JRFWR,JRFWLXDH,SJJRSM , YYYXTGLDW , to_char(GXSJ,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss ') as GXSJ, GSMS,SJZYGXZQ, SJGXFS as updateType, SJGXSJ as avgRecord,SJZYMS as avgStore,CLSJJLGM as dataNumberScale,CLSJCCGM as dataStoreScale, SJZYBQ1,SJZYBQ2,SJZYBQ3,SJZYBQ4,SJZYBQ5,SJZYBQ6 from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where upper(SJXJBM) = upper(#{tableId}) and zyzt = '1'
select distinct codetext from v_classify_info where upper(codeid) =upper(#{codeId}) and CODENAME IS NOT NULL and codetext IS NOT NULL and codetext !='数据来源分类'
select distinct codeid from v_classify_info where upper(codetext) =upper(#{codeText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and CODENAME IS NOT NULL and codeid IS NOT NULL and rownum =1

select.if: select v3.codename from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid=v2.parcodeid left join v_classify_info v3 on v3.parcodeid = v2.codeid where v1.codetext = '数据来源分类' and rownum =1 and upper(v3.codeid) = upper(#{id})
select v2.codename from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid=v2.parcodeid where v1.codetext = '数据来源分类' and upper(v2.codeid) = upper(#{id})

mapper.select: select valvalue as value, valtext as label, memo from synlte.fieldcodeval where upper(codeid) =upper(#{codeId})
select distinct b.codetext from( select parcodeid from v_classify_info where upper(codeid) = upper(#{codeId})) a left join v_classify_info b on a.parcodeid = b.codeid
select distinct sourceid from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where sourceid is not null and zyzt = '1'
select count(0) from synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO where upper(sourceid) = upper(#{sourceId}) and zyzt = '1'

select OBJECTID, OBJECTNAME, OBJECTMEMO, OBJECTSTATE, TABLEID,TABLENAME,RECENTDAYS OBJECTFLAG,DATATYPE,STORETYPE,DBSOURCE,SORTINDEX,PARENTID,TABLENAMEALIAS,DATA_SOURCE, EXHIVETABLENAME,HIVETABLENAME,DELETED,ELLEMENTNAME,DELETER,ISPRIVATE,SECRETLEVEL, RELATE_TABLENAME,SOURCEID,ISACTIVETABLE,HD_DBSOURCE,TABLENAME_B,ISQUERY,GA_SOURCEID,to_char(CREATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as createTime, to_char(UPDATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as updateTime, CREATOR as creator, UPDATER as updater from synlte."OBJECT" l
right join (select distinct id,userid , username from USER_AUTHORITY where USERID = #{userId} and upper(MODULECODE) = 'BZGL' ) r on upper(l.TABLEID) = upper(r.id)
left join(select distinct id, userid , username from USER_AUTHORITY where upper(MODULECODE) = 'BZGL') r on upper(l.TABLEID) = upper(r.id)
select count(0) from USER_AUTHORITY where ID = #{id} and USERID = #{userId}

select CODEID as codeValId, PARCODEID as codeId, CODETEXT as valText, CODEID as valValue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select CODEVALID as codeValId, CODEID as codeId, VALTEXT as valText, VALVALUE as valValue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')
mapper.update: update synlte.SYNLTEFIELD set field_class = #{fieldClassId} where upper(fieldid) = upper(#{fieldId})
mapper.select: select to_char(updatetime,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') from synlte."OBJECT" where upper(tableid) = upper(#{tableId}) and updatetime is not null and updatetime > to_date(#{updateStr},'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss')
select count(*) from synlte."OBJECT" where tableId = #{tableId}
select v1.CODETEXT||'/'||v2.CODETEXT as label,v1.codeid||'/'||v2.codeid as value from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.CODEID = v2.PARCODEID where v2.CODENAME = '01001'
select count(0) from synlte."OBJECT" where upper(TABLEID)= upper(#{tableId})
